hero.title: Beef with character
hero.subtitle: Every burger is stacked layer by layer before your eyes.
hero.buildHint: Keep scrolling to watch it build

menu.title: The menu
menu.subtitle: Aged beef, brioche bun, fire.
menu.empty: No dishes in this category yet.

order.title: Your order
order.emptyHint: Add something from the menu to get started.
order.items: {count, plural, =0 {0 items} one {# item} other {# items}}

story.title: It started with a grill and an obsession
story.subtitle: No shortcuts, nothing frozen, no excuses.
story.body: We age the beef, bake the bun every morning and stack each burger by hand. What reaches your table is the result of caring about every step.
story.pillar1Body: Dry-aged beef selection for deep, honest flavour.
story.pillar2Body: Artisan brioche baked every morning in our own bakery.
story.pillar3Body: Charcoal and high-heat searing for that perfect finish.
story.quote: We don't sell burgers, we build moments.

location.title: Come watch it burn
location.subtitle: Downtown, dine in or take away.

experiences.label: Experiences
experiences.title: Five ways to tell one burger
experiences.subtitle: One menu, five visual universes. Pick the one that breathes like your brand.

ember.intro: Low light, glowing coals and typography with a soul. Every shot is staged like a scene: warm light, film grain and weight in every move.

smash.intro: Colour that shouts, oversized type and kinetic energy. A street-bred, in-your-face aesthetic for brands that don't ask permission.

diner.intro: Roadside nostalgia with matter that truly bounces and falls. Warm, playful and tactile, like a classic all-American diner.

prime.intro: Whitespace, elegant serifs and liquid transitions. A restrained, premium experience where every gesture feels expensive.

nova.intro: Light, particles and infinite depth. A futuristic staging that turns the product into an enveloping showpiece.

gallery.title: Component gallery
gallery.subtitle: Every piece, across all five experiences.

preview.title: Build your restaurant's site
preview.subtitle: Type your name, pick a style, watch it live.
preview.photoHint: Upload an image to see it in the hero instantly.
preview.menuSubtitle: This is how your customers will see your burgers.
preview.tip: Switch style and color: the whole site transforms instantly.
preview.shareNote: The link remembers name, style and color. Photos stay on your device only.
preview.contactMessage: Hi Latech! I tried the configurator and I want the site for my burger house.

footer.newsletterBody: New burgers and events, no spam.

legal.cookiesBody: We use necessary first-party cookies to make the site work. Analytics and marketing cookies only run if you accept them. You can change your choice at any time.
legal.catNecessaryBody: Essential for the site to work (language, chosen visual experience and order state). These cannot be turned off.
legal.catAnalyticsBody: Help us understand, in aggregate, how the site is used so we can improve it. Only enabled with your consent.
legal.catMarketingBody: Allow us to show relevant content and advertising. Only enabled with your consent.
legal.templateDisclaimer: This is indicative template text and does not constitute legal advice. The site owner must fill in the [field] placeholders with their real information and have the content reviewed by a professional before publishing.
legal.noticeIdentBody: In compliance with Article 10 of Spanish Law 34/2002 on Information Society Services and E-Commerce (LSSI-CE), the following details of the owner of this website are provided:
legal.noticeObjectBody: This website's purpose is to present the owner's restaurant activity, its menu and to facilitate orders. Accessing and using the site confers user status and implies acceptance of the conditions set out in this legal notice.
legal.noticeUseBody: The user undertakes to make appropriate use of the contents and services, and not to use them for unlawful activities or activities contrary to good faith and public order. The owner reserves the right to modify the site's information without prior notice.
legal.noticeIpBody: All site contents (texts, photographs, graphics, images, design and code) are owned by the controller or by third parties who have authorised their use, and are protected by intellectual and industrial property law. Their reproduction, distribution or transformation without express authorisation is prohibited.
legal.noticeLiabilityBody: The owner is not liable for damages arising from improper use of the site or for its temporary unavailability due to technical reasons. Information on products, prices and availability may change; the information provided at the establishment prevails.
legal.noticeLinksBody: This site may contain links to third-party pages. The owner assumes no responsibility for their contents or for any data processing carried out by such third parties.
legal.noticeLawBody: The relationship between the owner and the user is governed by Spanish law. For the resolution of any dispute, the parties submit to the courts and tribunals that apply under the relevant consumer protection rules.
legal.privacyControllerBody: In accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and Spanish Organic Law 3/2018 (LOPDGDD), the controller of the personal data collected through this site is:
legal.privacyDataBody: We only process the data the user provides voluntarily. We do not collect data without a legitimate basis:
legal.privacyDataContact: Contact data the user chooses to send (for example, name and message in forms or enquiries).
legal.privacyDataOrder: Order data: orders are placed through the user's own WhatsApp app; the site does not store orders on a server.
legal.privacyDataTechnical: Technical and browsing data strictly necessary for the site to work.
legal.privacyPurposeBody: We process data for the following purposes:
legal.privacyPurposeWhatsapp: To manage and handle orders and enquiries initiated by the user.
legal.privacyPurposeContact: To respond to requests for information received.
legal.privacyPurposeAnalytics: Only with your consent: to produce aggregated usage statistics to improve the site.
legal.privacyLegalBasisBody: The legal basis is the data subject's consent (Art. 6.1.a GDPR) for communications and analytics, and the performance of pre-contractual measures or handling of the request (Art. 6.1.b GDPR) when the user initiates an order or enquiry. [The controller must align the legal bases with their actual processing].
legal.privacyRetentionBody: Data will be retained for as long as necessary to fulfil the purpose for which it was collected and, where applicable, for any legally required periods. [Specify concrete periods].
legal.privacyRecipientsBody: No data will be shared with third parties except where legally required. Technology providers serving the controller (hosting, messaging) act as processors under contract. [Detail providers and, where applicable, international transfers].
legal.privacyRightsBody: The user may exercise the following rights at any time:
legal.privacyRightsHow: To exercise them, write to [controller email] indicating the right you wish to exercise and attaching a copy of an identity document.
legal.privacyComplaint: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (www.aepd.es) if you consider that the processing does not comply with the rules.
legal.privacySecurityBody: The controller applies appropriate technical and organisational measures to ensure the security of personal data and prevent its alteration, loss or unauthorised access.
legal.cookiesWhatBody: Cookies are small files stored on your device when you visit a website. They are used to remember information about your visit, such as your preferences, and may be first-party (the owner's) or third-party.
legal.cookiesConsentBody: Except for strictly necessary cookies, we do not install any cookie or load any third-party resource until you accept their use. You can accept all, reject them, or configure your preferences by category via the consent panel.
legal.cookiesTypesBody: We classify cookies into the following categories:
legal.cookiesTypeNecessary: necessary for the site to work; always on and not requiring consent.
legal.cookiesTypeAnalytics: measure site usage in aggregate; only enabled with your consent.
legal.cookiesTypeMarketing: personalise content and advertising; only enabled with your consent.
legal.cookiesTableIntro: The cookies used on this site are listed below. The owner must complete the rows with [field] placeholders when adding third-party services.
legal.cookiesManageBody: You can review or change your consent at any time from the cookie panel:
legal.cookiesBrowserBody: You can also block or delete cookies from your browser settings. Note that disabling necessary cookies may affect how the site works.
legal.cookiesChangesBody: This policy may be updated to reflect regulatory or technical changes. We recommend reviewing it periodically.
